title: Deep Learning with Computer Vision
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M22 10v6M2 10l10-5 10 5-10 5z'/><path d='M6 12v5c0 2 2 3 6 3s6-1 6-3v-5'/></svg>
description: Completed a comprehensive course on computer vision techniques, CNNs, object detection, and image segmentation using Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV.

title: Machine Learning — Advanced Learning Algorithms
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='11' width='18' height='10' rx='2'/><circle cx='12' cy='5' r='1'/><path d='m12 7v4'/><rect x='8' y='16' width='2' height='1'/><rect x='14' y='16' width='2' height='1'/><rect x='9' y='21' width='6' height='1'/><rect x='7' y='4' width='10' height='2'/><path d='M7 2h10'/></svg>
description: Part of the Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng at Stanford University. Covered advanced supervised learning, decision trees, ensemble methods, neural networks, and best practices for ML systems.

title: Vice President — DIU CPC (R&J Wing)
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M3 21h18'/><path d='M5 21V7l8-4v18'/><path d='M19 21V11l-6-4'/><path d='M9 9v.01'/><path d='M9 12v.01'/><path d='M9 15v.01'/><path d='M9 18v.01'/></svg>
description: Appointed Vice President of the Research & Journal Wing of DIU-CPC. Led research activities, organized contests (Datathon, Prompt Battle), courses, and workshops.

title: 2nd Runner-Up — DoR Poster Presentation
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='8'/><path d='M12 8v4'/><path d='M8 12h8'/></svg>
description: Awarded 2nd Runner-Up in the Undergraduate Segment of the DIU Department of Research (DoR) Poster Presentation competition for research on deep learning for chest X-ray analysis.

title: Session Moderator — IDAA 2025
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v7a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z'/><path d='M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2'/><line x1='12' y1='19' x2='12' y2='23'/><line x1='8' y1='23' x2='16' y2='23'/></svg>
description: Served as Session Moderator at IDAA 2025, facilitating academic sessions on AI and intelligent data analysis.

title: ICPC Dhaka Regional — Closing Lead Volunteer
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='white' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='2' y='3' width='20' height='14' rx='2' ry='2'/><line x1='8' y1='21' x2='16' y2='21'/><line x1='12' y1='17' x2='12' y2='21'/></svg>
description: Served as Closing Lead Volunteer for ICPC Dhaka Regional 2024 at Daffodil International University, overseeing the closing ceremony and coordinating with organizers.
